pa_lesser_of_calculations.note: Pa.R.Civ.P. 1910.16-2(e)(1)(ii): obligation is the LESSER of a schedule lookup at the paying parent's own income alone, or a schedule lookup at combined income times that parent's share. Below the $1,255/mo Self-Support Reserve, courts have full discretion rather than a formula.

custody_adjustment.warning_message: The paying parent has 40% or more of the annual overnights (146+ days) — Pa.R.Civ.P. 1910.16-4(a)(1)(Part D)/(a)(2)(Part II) requires a separate shared-custody adjustment formula that this calculator does not compute. The amount shown is the basic (non-shared-custody) obligation only.

deviation_note: Above $30,000/month combined net income, Pennsylvania's schedule has no table value — courts use the high-income formula under Pa.R.Civ.P. 1910.16-3.1 instead. This calculator does not model the shared-custody adjustment (Pa.R.Civ.P. 1910.16-4(c), triggered at 146+ overnights/year for the paying parent) or spousal support/APL interactions.
